description: Maps provider-neutral capability-intent tiers to a Claude-native model ID. An agent or skill declares what KIND of work it needs (deep/balanced/fast/inherit), not a vendor model family; the host resolves the rest. Only the `claude` ID is consumed — scripts/project.mjs resolveClaudeModel() and scripts/lib/validate-permissions.mjs are the sole readers and both dereference `.claude` exclusively. OpenCode and Codex own their own model selection: Aegis emits no `model:` field on either host, so no per-host IDs are declared here. Cursor and Zed read rules, not skill frontmatter, and have no per-skill model-override surface at all. `aliasOf` keeps the retired Anthropic-family names resolving for back-compat. `fable` stays a resolvable alias but is NOT a declarable tier (same status `best` has) — it names a specific premium Claude model with no capability-intent meaning; see manifest/AGENTS.md. Unknown aliases hard-fail.
